top3.sql:
SELECT MIN(s.releaseDate) AS oldest_release_date, GROUP_CONCAT(l.format) AS legal_formats
FROM cards c
JOIN sets s ON c.setCode = s.code
JOIN legalities l ON c.uuid = l.uuid
WHERE c.rarity = 'mythic' AND l.status = 'Legal';

SELECT MIN(s.releaseDate) AS oldest_release_date, GROUP_CONCAT(l.format) AS legal_formats
FROM cards c
JOIN sets s ON c.setCode = s.code
JOIN legalities l ON c.uuid = l.uuid
WHERE c.rarity = 'mythic' AND l.status = 'Legal';

SELECT s.releaseDate AS oldest_release_date, GROUP_CONCAT(l.format) AS legal_formats
FROM cards c
JOIN sets s ON c.setCode = s.code
JOIN legalities l ON c.uuid = l.uuid
WHERE c.rarity = 'mythic' AND l.status = 'Legal'
GROUP BY s.releaseDate
ORDER BY s.releaseDate ASC
LIMIT 1;

FROM cards c

JOIN legalities l ON c.uuid = l.uuid
WHERE c.rarity = 'mythic' AND l.status = 'Legal';
